channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistani PM and Turkey's leader discuss regional peace, trade, and diplomatic efforts
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan addressed a joint press conference in Istanbul following a bilateral meeting focused on strengthening Pakistan-Turkey relations...

item.title: The Role of Public Arts Funding in Shaping National Narratives
item.description: James Graham's play 'Dear England' explores the intersection of arts funding, national identity, and storytelling. The article highlights how publicly funded arts enable cultural dialogue, using the p...

item.title: Competition Commission Investigates Franchise Sector for Fair Practices
item.description: The Competition Commission has launched a comprehensive inquiry into the R1-trillion franchise sector, focusing on allegations of unfair practices, barriers to black ownership, and power imbalances be...

item.title: Man accused of threatening ex-partner, assaulting her, and punching a dog
item.description: A 37-year-old man is alleged to have threatened to kill his former partner, assaulted her, and punched a dog before she managed to escape and alert a neighbor. Police were called to the incident in Go...

item.title: TMC MP Saugata Roy alleges BJP influence amid internal party dispute over Kolkata office control
item.description: Trinamool Congress (TMC) MP Saugata Roy has alleged that the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) is attempting to take control of TMC party offices across West Bengal, following a reported incident in which ...

item.title: America's self-destructive cycle: From revolutionary greed to modern political chaos
item.description: The article explores the cyclical nature of American political and social turmoil, tracing its roots to the nation's revolutionary past and its modern manifestations. It argues that the United States ...

item.title: The Cultural and Historical Significance of Canoes in Canada
item.description: The article explores the Canadian Canoe Museum's new exhibit, 'Canoe Perspectives,' which showcases over 40 paintings from the McCreath Collection, highlighting the canoe's role in Canada's history an...

item.title: Pakistan and Turkey leaders discuss trade, investment cooperation
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan held a bilateral meeting in Istanbul to strengthen economic ties. The leaders focused on enhancing trade and investment coopera...

item.title: The Rise of Minionese: How the Minions' Language Captivated Audiences
item.description: The Minions, the beloved yellow sidekicks from the Despicable Me franchise, have transcended their role as comedic helpers to become cultural icons. Their unique language, Minionese, has gained a mass...

item.title: Indigenous Dumagat Fishermen Express Concern Over Declining Water Levels at Angat Reservoir
item.description: The article highlights the growing concerns of Indigenous Dumagat fishermen regarding the declining water levels in the Angat Reservoir, a critical water source for the region. As the reservoir's wate...

item.title: Delta police arrest 4 suspects in fake kidnapping, false crash reports, and child abduction cases
item.description: The Delta State Police Command has arrested four suspects in a series of incidents involving fabricated crimes and public misinformation. The first case involves a man who faked his own kidnapping to ...

item.title: Yanga Secures 32nd Mainland Premier League Title with Fifth Consecutive Victory
item.description: Football giants Yanga have cemented their status as Tanzania's most decorated league club by winning their record-extending 32nd Mainland Premier League title. The victory parade in Dar es Salaam on J...

item.title: Trump's AI-Generated Signs Attempt to Shift Focus from Taylor Swift Wedding
item.description: President Donald Trump faced widespread ridicule after his administration posted AI-generated signs at Madison Square Garden, attempting to divert attention from Taylor Swift and NFL player Travis Kel...

item.title: Legal Debate Over Public Access to BIR Tax Records in Duterte's Impeachment Case
item.description: The House prosecutor and Manila 3rd District Representative Joel Chua argued that the sealed BIR tax records of Vice President Sara Duterte and her husband Manases Carpio should be opened publicly dur...

item.title: Meghalaya Chief Minister Highlights Severe Rainfall Deficit and Urges Preparedness for El Nino and Climate Change Impacts
item.description: Meghalaya Chief Minister Conrad K Sangma has raised serious concerns about the impact of climate change and the possible arrival of El Nino phenomenon on the state's weather patterns. Speaking at a wo...

item.title: Gachagua Denies Endorsement of Musyoka as Opposition Candidate, Warns Against Ethnic Coalitions
item.description: DCP leader Rigathi Gachagua has refuted claims that Kalonzo Musyoka has been chosen as the United Opposition's presidential candidate ahead of the 2027 elections. Speaking from his Wamunyoro residence...

item.title: Nigeria's IPI Urges Release of Journalist Stanley Ugagbe After Unlawful Arrest
item.description: The Nigerian National Committee of the International Press Institute (IPI Nigeria) has demanded the immediate release of journalist Stanley Ugagbe, who was arrested by security operatives after his ne...

item.title: Iran and Japan Discuss Oil Sales Amid Sanctions Waiver and Safety Concerns
item.description: Iran is engaging in discussions with Japanese companies to resume oil sales under a U.S. sanctions waiver, though buyers are seeking an extended waiver and assurances about shipping safety. The curren...

item.title: South Africa and England Begin Nations Championship Campaign with Rivalry at Ellis Park
item.description: The article details the upcoming rugby match between South Africa and England as part of the Nations Championship, highlighting the challenges both teams face. South Africa, the world champions, are s...

item.title: Challenges Facing America's Democracy Amid Political and Social Crises
item.description: The article critiques the state of American democracy in 2026, highlighting systemic failures under President Trump. It discusses the Supreme Court's role in enabling presidential accountability evasi...
